plugins.name: llm-observability
plugins.description: 22 ready-to-use skills covering the full LLM app lifecycle: build eval datasets, instrument, evaluate, optimize prompts, A/B test, human review, trace-based testing, user feedback, debug, reduce cost, resilience, RAG quality, hallucination detection, model comparison, agent success, multi-agent tracing, guardrails, red-teaming, drift alerts, PII-safe tracing, and tool selection.
